message.content:
@startuml
actor Customer
participant "Device" as Device
participant "DeviceProvisioningService" as DPS #cyan
participant "ProductIoTHub" as Hub #magenta
participant "FWProvider" as FW #magenta

note over Device, FW #lightyellow
Device was registered for this product before
end note

== First start ==

Customer -> Device: 1 Switch On/Power Up

Device -> Device: Booting up

Device -> DPS: 2 registerDevice(callback)
DPS -> Device: 3 callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ASSIGNED, IoTHubURI, deviceId)
Device -> Device: 4 setProperties
Device -> Hub: 5 iamNewToYou(deviceId, firmwareversion)

opt [Firmware needs to be updated]
    Hub -> Device: 6 updateFWMandantory(URL)
    Device -> FW: 7 URL.get(OLDFW)
    FW --> Device: 8 FW, Checksum

    Device -> Device: Downloading

    Device -> Device: 9 CheckChecksum
    Device -> Device: 10 update

    Device -> Device: Installing

    Device -> Device: 11 restart

    Device -> Device: Booting up

    Device -> Hub: 12 iamNewToYou(deviceId, firmwareversion)
end

Hub -> Device: 13 youMayStartSending()
Device -> Hub: 14 sendData(Data)

Device -> Device: Working

== Claim/Remove ==

Hub -> Device: 15 youMustRetire()
Device -> Device: 16 waits

opt [if Device was not reached]
    Device -> Hub: 17 sendData(Data)
    Hub --> Device: 18 Not registered

    Device -> DPS: 19 registerDevice(callback)
    DPS --> Device: 20 callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ERROR, null, null)
    Device -> Device: 21 NobodyLovesMeMode()

    loop [once a day]
        Device -> DPS: 22 registerDevice(callback)
    end
end

== IoT Hub not available ==

loop [several times]
    Device -> Hub: 23 sendData(Data)
    Hub --> Device: 24 NotAvailable/Network Error
end

Device -> DPS: 25 registerDevice(callback)
DPS --> Device: 26 callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ASSIGNED, IoTHubURI, deviceId)
Device -> Device: 27 compare IoTHub and change if necessary

note over Device, FW #lightyellow
if connection is now successfull, go on. If not and IoT Hub has not changed
repeat with low frequence. Also if DPS is not available.
end note

@enduml
